channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nithya Raman Moves Ahead of Spencer Pratt, Likely Facing Karen Bass in Los Angeles Mayoral Runoff
item.description: Los Angeles City Councilmember Nithya Raman has overtaken reality TV personality Spencer Pratt in the city's mayoral primary, now holding second place with 27.1% of votes counted compared to Pratt's 2...

item.title: Vintage Photos Showcase the Sophisticated Beachwear Fashion of the 1930s
item.description: This article from Vintage Everyday explores the distinctive beachwear fashion that emerged during the 1930s, highlighting how seaside clothing evolved beyond simple swimwear into a sophisticated categ...

item.title: Fugitive wanted over 1999 Sydney nightclub stabbing arrested in Greece after 27 years
item.description: Greek authorities have arrested James Dalamangas, one of Australia’s long-term most wanted fugitives, nearly 27 years after he allegedly fled Sydney following a fatal stabbing at a Belmore nightclub. ...

item.title: Quetta hospital staff member awarded for saving doctor during acid attack
item.description: In Quetta, a brave act of humanity has been recognised after a female doctor, Dr Mahnoor Nisar, was attacked with acid at Civil Hospital. The incident occurred on Saturday, and the doctor was initiall...

item.title: Analyst Warns Trump’s Economic Policies Could Harm His Party Ahead of Midterms
item.description: Political analyst David Pakman highlighted concerns about President Donald Trump's approach to the U.S. economy, warning it could backfire for him and the Republican Party in the upcoming midterms. Pa...

item.title: Former MAGA Podcaster Criticizes Trump Amid Rising Public Frustration
item.description: Comedian and former MAGA podcaster Tim Dillon recently delivered a sharp critique of former President Donald Trump, declaring that his political style 'is not cute anymore' as Americans face increasin...

item.title: Republicans Face Senate Battle Over Todd Blanche Confirmation Amid Internal Divisions
item.description: President Donald Trump's effort to confirm Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche as the permanent Attorney General is creating significant tension within the Republican Party ahead of the 2026 midterm ...

item.title: Diphtheria Outbreak Affecting Remote Indigenous Communities in Australia
item.description: Australia is experiencing its largest diphtheria outbreak in living memory, with the highly contagious bacterial disease spreading primarily through remote Indigenous communities across the Northern T...

item.title: Acetrea Cancer Advocacy Network Seeks Sponsorship to Train Oncology Nurses in Nigeria
item.description: The Acetrea Cancer Advocacy Network (ACAN) has launched an initiative to enhance cancer care by supporting oncology nurses’ professional development. ACAN is seeking sponsorship to send three exceptio...

item.title: Security and AI Updates: Chinese Peptide Labs, Meta AI Hacks, and NSA Collaborations
item.description: This week in security and technology news, Chinese peptide labs funded by cryptocurrency are seeing rapid growth, shifting from producing fentanyl precursors to largely unregulated peptide supplements...

item.title: Healthcare Costs for Children and Elders Strain Kenyan Families and Insurance Systems
item.description: Kenya is facing growing pressure on its healthcare system, mainly driven by the needs of school-going children and older adults. With over 8.5 million children and 1.4 million people aged 60 and above...

item.title: Tanzanian Analysts Back President Samia’s Russia Trip While Stressing Need for Careful Diplomacy
item.description: Tanzanian President Samia Suluhu Hassan recently made an official visit to Russia, which has received support from various political analysts in the country. These experts appreciate the move as it he...

item.title: Concerns Raised Over Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin's Use of Government Jet and Leadership Style
item.description: Senator Markwayne Mullin, President Donald Trump's nominee for Homeland Security secretary, has come under scrutiny following reports about his use of a government-funded $70 million Gulfstream jet. A...

item.title: Iran Halts Peace Negotiations with Trump Following Escalation in Middle East
item.description: Iranian officials involved in peace negotiations with the United States announced that a peace deal with President Donald Trump is no longer feasible, following recent military actions in the region. ...

item.title: Analyst criticizes Trump administration over alleged missteps slowing Iran peace efforts
item.description: According to a June 7, 2026 report, a national security analyst has argued that President Donald Trump’s efforts to broker a peace deal between Iran and Israel are being hindered by significant strate...

item.title: Steve Hilton criticizes California Democratic leadership over affordability, taxes, and homelessness
item.description: California Republican gubernatorial candidate Steve Hilton sharply criticized Democratic leadership in the state, arguing that 16 years of one-party control have made California increasingly unafforda...

item.title: Government introduces stricter immigration enforcement, border controls and employer penalties while reaffirming opposition to xenophobia
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has announced a broad set of measures aimed at strengthening South Africa’s management of illegal immigration while cautioning against xenophobia and vigilantism. Speaking in...

item.title: Analyst Says Trump's Heated Exchange With NBC's Kristen Welker Could Affect Republican Support Ahead of Midterms

item.title: Legal expert raises concerns over DOJ settlement fund tied to Trump IRS lawsuit and alleged insider dealing
item.description: A legal controversy has emerged involving a proposed Department of Justice (DOJ) initiative and its connection to a settlement linked to President Donald Trump. According to reporting, the DOJ had bee...

item.title: China expands car exports as domestic market oversupply pushes growth abroad
item.description: Chinese carmakers are rapidly increasing their presence in international markets as overproduction at home drives them to export more vehicles. Despite China being the world's largest car market, a su...
